asciidoc1.description: AsciiDoc plugin for Apollo. Parses .adoc/.asciidoc files to extract sections, includes, cross-references, links, code blocks, and document attributes.
asciidoc1.author: Fujio Turner

c1.description: C source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .c/.h files to extract functions, structs, and includes.
c1.author: Fujio Turner

cmake1.description: CMake plugin for Apollo. Parses CMakeLists.txt and .cmake files to extract targets, functions, variables, includes, and module dependencies.
cmake1.author: Fujio Turner

cpp17.description: C++17 source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .cpp/.hpp files to extract classes, functions, methods, macros, and includes.
cpp17.author: Fujio Turner

csharp12.description: C# 12 source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .cs files to extract classes, interfaces, methods, properties, and imports.
csharp12.author: Fujio Turner

csv1.description: CSV file plugin for Apollo. Parses .csv files to extract headers, row counts, and structured table data for data documentation and dataset analysis.
csv1.author: Fujio Turner

dart3.description: Dart 3 plugin for Apollo. Parses .dart files to extract classes, methods, functions, imports/exports, and call sites with null-safety and async markers.
dart3.author: Fujio Turner

docker_compose1.description: Docker Compose plugin for Apollo. Parses docker-compose.yml/compose.yml files to extract services, image references, depends_on edges, volumes, and environment variables.
docker_compose1.author: Fujio Turner

dockerfile1.description: Dockerfile plugin for Apollo. Parses Dockerfile files to extract FROM image references, RUN/COPY/ADD steps, ENV/ARG variables, and multi-stage build relationships.
dockerfile1.author: Fujio Turner

editorconfig1.description: EditorConfig plugin for Apollo. Parses .editorconfig files to extract sections and properties as variables.
editorconfig1.author: Fujio Turner

elixir1.description: Elixir plugin for Apollo. Parses .ex/.exs files to extract modules, def/defp functions, import/alias statements, pipe chains, and macro/guard patterns.
elixir1.author: Fujio Turner

env1.description: Environment variables plugin for Apollo. Parses .env files to extract KEY=value pairs as variables.
env1.author: Fujio Turner

github_actions1.description: GitHub Actions plugin for Apollo. Parses .github/workflows/*.yml files to extract jobs as functions, uses declarations as imports, and environment variables.
github_actions1.author: Fujio Turner

gitignore1.description: Gitignore plugin for Apollo. Parses .gitignore files to extract ignore patterns and comments as variables.
gitignore1.author: Fujio Turner

go1.description: Go 1.x source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .go files to extract packages, functions, structs, interfaces, methods, and imports.
go1.author: Fujio Turner

gradle1.description: Gradle plugin for Apollo. Parses build.gradle and build.gradle.kts files to extract dependencies as imports, tasks as functions, and versions as variables.
gradle1.author: Fujio Turner

html5.description: HTML5 plugin for Apollo. Uses the Python standard library `html.parser` (zero third-party deps) to extract ``, h1–h6 sections with body text and parent/child hierarchy, asset import edges (`<script src>`, `<link rel=stylesheet>`, `<img>`, `<iframe>`, `<source>`), inline `<script>` / `<style>` / `<pre><code class="language-…">` code blocks, anchor + image links, `<meta>` tags, and tagged `<!-- TODO/FIXME -->` HTML comments from `.html` / `.htm` / `.xhtml` files.
html5.author: Fujio Turner

java17.description: Java 17 source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .java files to extract classes, interfaces, methods, fields, and imports.
java17.author: Fujio Turner

javascript1.description: JavaScript 1.x source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .js, .jsx, and .mjs files to extract functions, classes, imports, and variables.
javascript1.author: Fujio Turner

json1.description: JSON file plugin for Apollo. Parses .json files to extract top-level keys as variables, detects $ref schema references, and analyzes JSON structure for knowledge graph integration.
json1.author: Fujio Turner

jsonschema.description: JSON Schema plugin for Apollo. Parses .schema.json files to extract schema definitions, $ref relationships, type hierarchies, and property specifications for data validation documentation.
jsonschema.author: Fujio Turner

jupyter1.description: Jupyter notebook plugin for Apollo. Parses .ipynb files to extract code cells as functions, markdown cells as sections, and imports/calls.
jupyter1.author: Fujio Turner

k8s_manifest1.description: Kubernetes manifest plugin for Apollo. Parses K8s YAML to extract Deployments/Pods/Services as classes, containers as methods, environment variables, and image references as imports.
k8s_manifest1.author: Fujio Turner

kotlin2.description: Kotlin source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .kt/.kts files to extract classes, interfaces, functions, methods, and imports.
kotlin2.author: Fujio Turner

lua5.description: Lua 5 plugin for Apollo. Parses .lua files to extract functions, tables, require() statements, and module assignments.
lua5.author: Fujio Turner

makefile1.description: Makefile plugin for Apollo. Parses Makefile/GNUmakefile/.mk files to extract targets, prerequisites, recipes, variables, and include directives.
makefile1.author: Fujio Turner

markdown_gfm.description: GitHub Flavored Markdown plugin for Apollo. Uses `mistune` (with the `table` and `task_lists` extensions) plus `python-frontmatter` to extract sections (with body content, parent/child hierarchy, and anchor ids), code blocks, links, cross-doc imports, `[[wikilinks]]`, GFM/MkDocs/Pandoc callouts, tagged TODO/FIXME comments, tables, task items, and YAML/TOML frontmatter from `.md` / `.markdown` files.
markdown_gfm.author: Fujio Turner

maven1.description: Maven plugin for Apollo. Parses pom.xml files to extract dependencies as imports, modules, and properties as variables.
maven1.author: Fujio Turner

node20.description: Node.js 20 source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .js, .mjs, and .cjs files to extract functions, classes, requires, imports, exports, and dependencies.
node20.author: Fujio Turner

openapi3.description: OpenAPI 3 plugin for Apollo. Parses OpenAPI 3.x YAML/JSON specs to extract endpoints, schemas, parameters, and $ref relationships for API documentation integration.
openapi3.author: Fujio Turner

org1.description: Org Mode plugin for Apollo. Parses .org files to extract headings, links, code blocks, properties, and TODO/task items.
org1.author: Fujio Turner

pdf_pypdf.description: PDF plugin for Apollo, powered by the `pypdf` library. Extracts page text from `.pdf` files and self-disables (falls back to the generic text indexer) when `pypdf` is not importable.
pdf_pypdf.author: Fujio Turner

php8.description: PHP 8 source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .php files to extract classes, interfaces, functions, methods, and imports.
php8.author: Fujio Turner

powershell7.description: PowerShell 7 plugin for Apollo. Parses .ps1 files to extract function definitions, dot-sourced scripts, cmdlet calls, module imports, and parameter declarations.
powershell7.author: Fujio Turner

properties1.description: Java properties files plugin for Apollo. Parses .properties and .props files to extract key=value pairs as variables.
properties1.author: Fujio Turner

python3.description: Python 3 source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .py files with the standard library `ast` module to extract functions, classes, methods, decorators, calls, complexity, exceptions, and framework patterns.
python3.author: Fujio Turner

r1.description: R plugin for Apollo. Parses .R/.r files to extract functions defined via <- and =, library()/require() calls, and assignments.
r1.author: Fujio Turner

rmarkdown1.description: R Markdown plugin for Apollo. Parses .Rmd files to extract R code chunks as functions, markdown sections, and R imports/calls.
rmarkdown1.author: Fujio Turner

rst1.description: reStructuredText plugin for Apollo. Parses .rst files to extract sections, directives, internal/external links, code blocks, and Sphinx cross-references.
rst1.author: Fujio Turner

ruby3.description: Ruby source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .rb files to extract classes, modules, methods, functions, and imports.
ruby3.author: Fujio Turner

rust1.description: Rust source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .rs files to extract structs, enums, traits, functions, methods, and imports.
rust1.author: Fujio Turner

scala3.description: Scala 3 plugin for Apollo. Parses .scala files to extract classes, objects, traits, methods, import statements, and call sites.
scala3.author: Fujio Turner

shell1.description: Bash/Shell plugin for Apollo. Parses .sh/.bash files to extract function definitions, sourced files (`. file.sh`), called commands, and variables.
shell1.author: Fujio Turner

sql1.description: SQL plugin for Apollo. Parses .sql files to extract CREATE TABLE/VIEW/FUNCTION/PROCEDURE definitions, column declarations, and table/view references from queries.
sql1.author: Fujio Turner

swift5.description: Swift source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .swift files to extract classes, structs, enums, protocols, functions, and methods.
swift5.author: Fujio Turner

terraform1.description: Terraform plugin for Apollo. Parses .tf files to extract resources as functions, data sources as classes, variables as variables, and module sources as imports.
terraform1.author: Fujio Turner

toml1.description: TOML file plugin for Apollo. Parses .toml files to extract tables, keys, and dependency lists from Rust Cargo.toml, Python pyproject.toml, and other TOML configurations.
toml1.author: Fujio Turner

typescript1.description: TypeScript source-file plugin for Apollo. Parses .ts/.tsx files to extract classes, interfaces, functions, methods, and imports.
typescript1.author: Fujio Turner

xml1.description: XML file plugin for Apollo. Parses .xml files to extract elements, attributes, namespace declarations, and internal id/href references for document structure analysis.
xml1.author: Fujio Turner

yaml1.description: YAML file plugin for Apollo. Parses .yaml/.yml files to extract keys, anchors/aliases, !include directives, and references for configuration documentation.
yaml1.author: Fujio Turner
